daily.today_energy: Your magnetic presence is at peak levels today. The universe is basically handing you the spotlight—use it to vibe with people authentically rather than seeking validation. Trust your gut instincts; they're running hot.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, genuine connection is calling your name. If you've been holding back honest feelings, today's the energy for it. Vulnerability hits different when you own it with confidence.
daily.career: Creative momentum is real right now. Channel that Leo fire into projects that actually excite you, not just ones that look good on paper. Your unique perspective is your superpower—let it shine without overthinking.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever makes you feel alive in your skin. Energy follows intention, so prioritize activities that make you genuinely happy.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to lean into your authenticity, Leo. You're radiating a magnetic frequency that draws the right people closer. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting.
weekly.love: Your vibe is irresistible rn, but the universe is asking you to be intentional about who gets access. Quality over quantity applies to connections too. If you're coupled up, vulnerability hits different this week.
weekly.career: Mercury's supporting your communication game hard. This is your moment to pitch ideas, have those convos you've been postponing, or just let your creative energy flow naturally. Your voice matters more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, stretch, walk in nature—anything that reconnects you with feeling alive. Energy levels are steady; honor what your system actually needs.
